description_long: This is a rectangular, amber-colored glass bottle with a black screw cap and prominent white branding and text on all sides. The front label displays the Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey branding in ornate white script on a black background, with detailed product information. The sides and back of the bottle feature additional white text and graphics, including awards, a distillery illustration, and product details. The bottle has a faceted, angular shoulder and base, giving it a distinctive, classic whiskey bottle silhouette. The cap is tall and black, with a white circular logo on top. The bottle's surface appears glossy and smooth, with no visible damage or wear.
description: A rectangular amber glass whiskey bottle with a black screw cap and ornate white Jack Daniel's branding on all sides. The bottle features a glossy finish and detailed text and graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 label in ornate white script on a black background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a list of gold medal awards and accolades in white text on a black label.
description_view_2: Rear view with product information, barcode, and additional branding details in white on black.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a white illustration of the distillery and a generational message.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 branding and ornate text on the front, white text with awards and product details on the sides and back, and a white distillery illustration. All labels are on a black background with high contrast.
